createWithDurationsLD(address,address,(a.details: Requirements: - There must be at least one element in `batch`. - All requirements from {ISablierLockupDynamic.createWithDurationsLD} must be met for each stream.

params.batch: An array of structs, each encapsulating a subset of the parameters of {ISablierLockupDynamic.createWithDurationsLD}.
params.token: The contract address of the ERC-20 token to be distributed.

returns.streamIds: The ids of the newly created streams.

createWithDurationsLL(address,address,(a.details: Requirements: - There must be at least one element in `batch`. - All requirements from {ISablierLockupLinear.createWithDurationsLL} must be met for each stream.

params.batch: An array of structs, each encapsulating a subset of the parameters of {ISablierLockupLinear.createWithDurationsLL}.
params.token: The contract address of the ERC-20 token to be distributed.

returns.streamIds: The ids of the newly created streams.

createWithDurationsLT(address,address,(a.details: Requirements: - There must be at least one element in `batch`. - All requirements from {ISablierLockupTranched.createWithDurationsLT} must be met for each stream.

params.batch: An array of structs, each encapsulating a subset of the parameters of {ISablierLockupTranched.createWithDurationsLT}.
params.token: The contract address of the ERC-20 token to be distributed.

returns.streamIds: The ids of the newly created streams.

createWithTimestampsLD(address,address,(.details: Requirements: - There must be at least one element in `batch`. - All requirements from {ISablierLockupDynamic.createWithTimestampsLD} must be met for each stream.

params.batch: An array of structs, each encapsulating a subset of the parameters of {ISablierLockupDynamic.createWithTimestampsLD}.
params.token: The contract address of the ERC-20 token to be distributed.

returns.streamIds: The ids of the newly created streams.

createWithTimestampsLL(address,address,(.details: Requirements: - There must be at least one element in `batch`. - All requirements from {ISablierLockupLinear.createWithTimestampsLL} must be met for each stream.

params.batch: An array of structs, each encapsulating a subset of the parameters of {ISablierLockupLinear.createWithTimestampsLL}.
params.token: The contract address of the ERC-20 token to be distributed.

returns.streamIds: The ids of the newly created streams.

createWithTimestampsLPG(address,address,.details: Notes: - The LPG model does not support a "createWithDuration" function because the {SablierLockup} contract is at the size limit. If the EVM contract size limit is increased in the future, this function will be added. Requirements: - There must be at least one element in `batch`. - All requirements from {ISablierLockupPriceGated.createWithTimestampsLPG} must be met for each stream.

params.batch: An array of structs, each encapsulating a subset of the parameters of {ISablierLockupPriceGated.createWithTimestampsLPG}.
params.token: The contract address of the ERC-20 token to be distributed.

returns.streamIds: The ids of the newly created streams.

createWithTimestampsLT(address,address,(.details: Requirements: - There must be at least one element in `batch`. - All requirements from {ISablierLockupTranched.createWithTimestampsLT} must be met for each stream.

params.batch: An array of structs, each encapsulating a subset of the parameters of {ISablierLockupTranched.createWithTimestampsLT}.
params.token: The contract address of the ERC-20 token to be distributed.

returns.streamIds: The ids of the newly created streams.

createWithDurationsLD(address,address,(a.notice: Creates a batch of LD streams using `createWithDurationsLD`.

createWithDurationsLL(address,address,(a.notice: Creates a batch of LL streams using `createWithDurationsLL`.

createWithDurationsLT(address,address,(a.notice: Creates a batch of LT streams using `createWithDurationsLT`.

createWithTimestampsLD(address,address,(.notice: Creates a batch of LD streams using `createWithTimestampsLD`.

createWithTimestampsLL(address,address,(.notice: Creates a batch of LL streams using `createWithTimestampsLL`.

createWithTimestampsLPG(address,address,.notice: Creates a batch of LPG streams using `createWithTimestampsLPG`.

createWithTimestampsLT(address,address,(.notice: Creates a batch of LT streams using `createWithTimestampsLT`.
